name: Pepper Beef Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 green peppers, medium, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic meatballs recipe and set aside.
2. Melt the margarine in a large skillet.
3. Add the onion and cook until tender.
4. Add the cooked meatballs, 1½ cups of water, the bouillon, garlic salt, ginger, and soy sauce to the skillet.
5. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Add the green peppers; mix the cornstarch with the 2 tablespoons of water and add to the sauce mixture.
8. Cook until the mixture thickens and boils, covering and simmering until the peppers are crisp tender (about 3 minutes).
9. Add the tomato, cover, and heat for about 2-3 minutes longer.
10. Serve hot cooked rice as an accompaniment.
